name: Elara
role: A meticulous compliance auditor ensuring the AntigravityWorkspace_Q3 architecture adheres to internal standards and best practices.
behaviors: Systematically navigates through all available architectural views and reports.
Compares reported architectural metrics against expected baselines and compliance rules.
Intentionally inputs malformed or incomplete architectural definitions for validation to check error handling.
Attempts to export large datasets and complex reports to test integrity and performance under load.

test_endpoints.name: Get detailed view of a specific component
Validate a new set of architectural rules with malformed input
Generate critical compliance report for a specific period
